feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: List of Cost Centers creation
entry.content:
Hi All

How to quickly create a long list of Cost Accounting Dimensional Cost Centers?

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Issue in Inventory Counting Screen SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

We are currently facing an issue in the inventory counting screen for a few items. As of now, I am sharing an example of one item for your reference:

  • Item Code: 10015
  • Inventory Counting Screen shows: 8856.2500 qty
  • Inventory Audit Report shows: 28956.25 qty
  • Inventory Counting Screen Count date and inventory audit report date : 31/03/2025

Please do the needful on it.

 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SBO Mailer Configuration
entry.content:
Dears,

During Configuration SBO Mailer and Test connection

The problem in the below image appeared

Please, advise

Many thanks

entry.title: Inventory audit report and trail balance amount miss mismatch
entry.content:
Hi All,
There is missmatch for some accounts balance in Inventory Audit Report and Trail Balance , In SAP B1, what can be the possible reason behind this miss match ?

For example as on 31/12/2024

1040080 - Raw Materials - is showing  17,11,57,815.03 amount in Trail Balance and showing  17,17,79,934.85  as per Inventory Audit Report.

Need guidance for investigating it.

entry.title: master data cleanup wizard - item not listed
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I attempted to delete item master data using the Master Data Cleanup Wizard, but in Step 3, the item list is not displayed.

Before reaching Step 3, I receive a pop-up message stating: "The following workstations are connected to the company." However, I have already disconnected all users and created a backup before starting the cleanup process. Despite this, I continue to receive the same message, and it still shows some workstations as connected.

SAP Business One Version - 10.00.280 (FP2502) 64-bit

KBA : 2949632, 3262956 and 3082700.

Your assistance in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Update Batch Number in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
   Can we update Batch number in SAP Business One?
 
We have observed that, we can update it through Batch Number update screen, but some time can be done some time it is not allowing even though there is stock available.
 
 
Regards,
Gazanfar Ali Shaikh

entry.title: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue for Production" with bin locations
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to write a query in SAP B1 HANA to show a production order along with its Issue for Production including the Bin Location but whenever I try the bin location is blank?
Any help appreciated.
This is where I got to:
SELECT
T1."ItemCode", T1."ItemName", T3."BinCode", T0."TransNum", T0."ItemCode" AS "IssueItem", T2."OnHandQty" AS "QuantityInBin"
FROM "OINM" T0
INNER JOIN "OITM" T1 ON T0."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode"
INNER JOIN "OIBQ" T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
INNER JOIN "OBIN" T3 ON T2."BinAbs" = T3."AbsEntry"
WHERE T0."TransType" = '59'
But I need to start with the Production order and link in the Issue for Production.

Thanks

entry.title: Understanding of SAP Business One.
entry.content:
Dear Expertise,

As a fresher looking to enhance my understanding of SAP Business One, I would like to request video links or any available resources that cover the Sales-A/R and Purchasing-A/P modules, including all related sub-modules.

 

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.261) Erro: Unhandled Exception
entry.content:
Olá, atualizamos nosso SAP Business One para version for SAP HANA (10.00.261) e nos deparamos com a mensagem de erro:

Unhandled Exception
SAP Business One has encountered a problem and needs to close. Diagnostic file will not be created.
If you want to create the diagnostic file, please open menu 'Help /Support Desk / Logger Settings' and check 'Create a Dump File on System Failure'.
Kindly refer to note 1989457, to assist you in supporting application shutdown issues in SAP Business One.

A solução que encontramos foi testar as autorizações até encontrar as permissões que sanasse o erro.
E as autorizações necessárias para solucionar o problema foi dar autorização total a todas as series de numeração dentro de Administração/Inicialização do sistema/Série de numeração.

Mas acreditamos que a SAP irá corrigir esse erro, pois a mensagem não indica o real problema.

entry.title: WIP Stock consumption report sap b1
entry.content:
Dear all,

WIP Stock consumption report sap b1. 

Is there any relevant query for SQL SAP  B1 version then please guide on it?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: User Defined Field for OSRN table
entry.content: I would like to add another column to the OSRN table, so that i can see this extra information in the serial number details window. The best way should be to add a user defined field, but i can't find the right table in the "user defined fields - management" window. How should i move forward?

entry.title: SAP B1: Can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style
entry.content:
I can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style form.

I've tried done it with DIAPI GeneralService & GeneralData and it works but can't add or update the data from the Matrix Style form. Also tried with Header Line Style and it works as well.

Only Link to Entity field not alphanumeric field.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Quantities sold per warehouse
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to know the total quantities sold per warehouse of all items that were entered a year or more ago.

I have the start of query:

SELECT
T0.[CreateDate],
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName]

FROM 
OITM T0 

WHERE 
T0.[CreateDate] <=[%0]

ORDER BY
1 DESC

The result must be someting like this:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATION DATE   ITEM CODE   ITEM NAME     WAREHOUSE1   WAREHOUSE2  WAREHOUSE 3
08-09-2022      APP         APPLE         1             82         0
14-12-2019      PEE         PEER          84           160         0
25-07-2018      ORA         ORANGES       120          180         14

Can someone help me with that?

entry.title: Approval based on sum of qualified rows in a Purchase Quotation
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm trying to write an approval user query to check the sum of LineTotal of a particular item in a marketing document, such as a Purchase Quotation. Is that possible?

SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE' WHERE
(SUM($[$38.21.number]) WHERE $[$38.1.11] = 'ZZ-SL-00005') > 5000

entry.title: Query Help - Onhand Inventory Date in Warehouse
entry.content:
Hello, 
Can anyone help me with this?

I need a query to show if there is onhand inventory in a warehouse that was put in there greater than 2 weeks.

The customer has warehouse setup for returns, so all returns go in there so they can be quality checked before moving to the main warehouse for shipping.

I need a query to show me any item and inventory that is in there for longer than 2 weeks.

Example:
Item      Date           Qty
ABC1    04/05/25    100
ABC1    03/24/25    200
ABC1    02/20/25    150

I need to have the 3/24 and 02/20 in the query.

I am having problems figuring out what tables to use.  They are using Hana.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction exception in ServiceLayer
entry.content:
Sap Business One Service Layer V1.26

Using a .Net OData client for Service Layer as described in the `OData Client for Service Layer` document https://help.sap.com/doc/138a52ba164b4c3197ff4d19621400a3/10.0/en-US/4e330dc617254c4e942ba42116bff90c.pdf

Since updating to Sap Business One 2502 (Could have happened prior, error is rather rare), we are getting rare, intermittent errors when using the Service Layer API to create & update activities. The activities are still modified successfully, however the response we are getting indicates some sort of failure.

Has anyone else had this issue?
Is there logs in Sap that I can check to help diagnose this issue further?

Thanks in advance 🙂

Exception & Error json

Microsoft.OData.Client.DataServiceClientException: { "error" : { "code" : "-1116", "details" : [ { "code" : "", "message" : "" } ], "message" : "Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction" } }

entry.title: Inquiry about setting the default values for depreciation execution options
entry.content:
Dear. SAP Support

I hope this message finds you well

Below Image

Can I set the following option to be checked by default?

If users miss selecting this option, journal entries may be generated without the cost center for depreciation expenses.

Best Regards,

Daesung Park

entry.title: Offline Access Token Required After Server Restart – SAP B1 Excel report and interactive analysis
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm using SAP Business One 10 for SAP HANA, version SP 2402 (64-bit).
I've created an analytical reports and scheduled it through the portal.

However, after restarting the Linux server, none of the previously scheduled reports work anymore.

When I log back into the portal, only newly created reports function properly—these prompt me to generate an offline access token, and then they work as expected.

For the older reports, I have to re-create the schedules from scratch.

Has anyone encountered this issue or knows how to resolve it?

 

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Batch Number Transactions Report in SAP Business One Web Browser?
entry.content:
Hi All

Anyone knows whether Batch Number Transactions Report in SAP Business One Web Browser?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Outgoing Payment Print Layout Design has limitation on its Repetitive row details
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm SAP Business One Outgoing Payment Print Layout Design has limitation on its Repetitive row details?  It does not print anything no matter what Field is placed on its Repetitive row details?

We managed to place Account Type Outgoing Payment GL Account Code on the Start of Report Header level but it will only show the first GL Account if there are multiple GL Accounts in Account Type Outgoing Payment.

 

Kedalene Chong
